_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to take turns, speak clearly, listen actively, and respond to others during conversations and discussions.

_source.w: We are learning to take turns, speak clearly, listen actively, and respond to others during conversations and discussions.
y: Good communication means being both a great speaker and a great listener.
These skills help us learn from each other during class discussions.
Being able to interact well makes group work and conversations more enjoyable.
eg: We wait for our turn to speak and do not interrupt others.
We look at the person speaking and show we are listening.
We respond to what someone says by adding to their idea or asking a question.
We practise speaking clearly so everyone in the group can hear.
We use phrases like 'I agree because…' or 'I think differently because…' to respond.
We play a listening game where we repeat back what a partner said.
